integration_notes: The primary objective is to speed up the training loop. We will utilize torch.compile with max-autotune and ensure mixed-precision training is correctly enabled for the A100. Data augmentation overhead should be minimized by moving operations to the GPU where possible.
performance_task: Implement aggressive TorchCompile and optimize the training loop's data throughput to minimize total execution time without sacrificing final accuracy.
reliability_task: Ensure data loading remains robust and cache-friendly on the Modal volume to avoid I/O bottlenecks during rapid experimentation.
round_goal: Maintain 94.00%+ accuracy while optimizing the training pipeline for reduced latency and overhead.
